name: Zenas BioPharma, Inc.
business: Zenas BioPharma is a clinical stage global biopharmaceutical company committed to being a leader in the development and commercialization of transformative immunology-based therapies. Its lead product candidate is obexelimab, a bifunctional monoclonal antibody designed to bind both CD19 and FcγRIIb. It is also developing orelabrutinib, a highly selective and CNS-penetrant, oral small molecule BTK inhibitor, for multiple sclerosis.
sellsTo: Patients with autoimmune diseases (IgG4-RD, MS, SLE)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage global biopharmaceutical company committed to being a leader in the development and commercialization of transformative immunology-based therapies for patients in need.

catalysts.event: Submit BLA for obexelimab in IgG4-RD to FDA
catalysts.sentence: Based on these results, we plan to submit the obexelimab BLA to the FDA for the treatment of IgG4-RD in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Submit MAA for obexelimab in IgG4-RD to EMA
catalysts.sentence: We also intend to submit an MAA to the EMA in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Report topline results from SunStone trial (obexelimab in SLE)
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline results, including biomarker data, from the SunStone trial, including biomarker data, in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 3 program for obexelimab in SLE
catalysts.sentence: Based on the outcome of the SunStone trial, and considering other factors, we may initiate a Phase 3 program in patients with SLE in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 3 trial for orelabrutinib in non-active SPMS
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, we plan to initiate a second global, Phase 3, multicenter, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trial evaluating orelabrutinib dosed 80 mg QD compared to placebo in patients with non-active SPMS, with a primary endpoint of time to onset of 24-week CDP.

catalysts.event: Submit IND and initiate Phase 1 for ZB021
catalysts.sentence: Subject to the results of IND-enabling studies, we, along with our partner, InnoCare, expect to submit an IND application for ZB021, and if cleared, initiate a Phase 1 clinical study in 2026.

catalysts.event: Submit IND and initiate Phase 1 for ZB022
catalysts.sentence: Subject to the results of IND-enabling studies, we expect to submit an IND application for ZB022, and if cleared, initiate a Phase 1 clinical study in 2026.
